_publications._publicationTitle: Tumor suppressor alterations cooperate to drive aggressive mesotheliomas with enriched cancer stem cells via a p53-miR-34a-c-Met axis.

_contextSnippet: Moreover, adherent MM cells from Nf2+/−;p16/p19+/− mice stained more intensely for the MM-specific CSC marker CD24 than did MM cells from WT mice
details: Adherent MM cells from Nf2+/−;p16/p19+/− mice stained more intensely for CD24 than MM cells from WT mice
